user.title: VUN EV Charge Monitor
user.description: Choose the Home Assistant zone to search around and the data provider.

data.api_key: API key (optional, only if the provider requires one)
data.simulation_mode: Simulation mode (use local test data, no real API calls)

tracking.title: Tracked persons and devices
tracking.description: Select the person(s) and/or device tracker(s) whose zone entry should be monitored.

search.title: Search options
search.description: Configure how charging locations are searched and filtered.

data.operator_exclude: Exclude operators (type a name and press enter)
data.use_driving_distance: Use real driving distance for the top results (requires an OpenRouteService API key)
data.ors_api_key: OpenRouteService API key (needed for driving distance and/or route-based search)
data.route_destination_zone: Route destination zone (optional — if set, searches along the route to this zone instead of around a fixed radius)
data.route_corridor_m: Route corridor width (how far from the route a charging point may be)

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Configure how and when you are notified about nearby charging locations.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate VUN EV Charge Monitor
reauth_confirm.description: The configured API key is no longer valid. Enter a new API key.

error.invalid_zone: The selected zone could not be found or has no valid coordinates.
error.invalid_entity: Select at least one existing person or device tracker.
error.invalid_notification_service: The selected notification target could not be found.
error.invalid_radius: The search radius is outside the allowed range.
error.invalid_interval: The update interval is outside the allowed range.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the provider.
error.invalid_auth: The API key was rejected by the provider, or the provider requires an API key that was not provided.
error.rate_limited: The provider is rate-limiting requests. Try again later.
error.unsupported_provider: This provider is not supported yet.
error.missing_routing_key: Driving distance or route-based search is enabled but no OpenRouteService API key was provided.

options.open_charge_map: Open Charge Map (static location data only, requires your own API key)

zone_removed.title: Zone no longer exists
zone_removed.description: The zone used by '{entry_title}' ({zone}) no longer exists. Recreate the zone or reconfigure the integration to select a different zone.

tracked_entity_removed.title: Tracked entity no longer exists
tracked_entity_removed.description: The tracked entity {entity_id} used by '{entry_title}' no longer exists. Reconfigure the integration to update the selected persons/device trackers.

provider_unavailable.title: Provider unavailable
provider_unavailable.description: '{entry_title}' has not been able to reach its data provider for several consecutive attempts. Check your network connection and, if applicable, your API key.

notification_service_missing.title: Notification target missing
notification_service_missing.description: '{entry_title}' has notifications enabled, but no valid notification target is configured. Open the integration's options to select a notification target.

get_nearby_chargers.name: Get nearby chargers
get_nearby_chargers.description: Returns the current top charging locations for a VUN EV Charge Monitor config entry.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry
config_entry_id.description: The VUN EV Charge Monitor config entry to query.

max_results.name: Maximum results
max_results.description: Maximum number of charging locations to return.
